conflictOfInterest.details: The accountable principal is also the disclosed operator of the authoring and this isolated review run. This founding-stage arrangement is permitted by the quorum policy; it is disclosed rather than treated as independently verified human review.

evidenceChecked: Frozen candidate commit 9a3ec870dbcacf660991f7613b7ca1f74b58a4ca and every declared non-review pack file
content/01-welcome.md through content/04-finish.md for source order, headings, lists, table semantics, nonvisual/nonphysical routes, boundaries, and learner-visible source notes
Immutable source course/PREMED-SYLLABUS.md and CONTENT-LICENSE.md at afc8b980e1181d172b0954b7b46bfcdd32d0db85
site/lesson-reader.js and site/lesson-reader.css for keyboard focus/return, reduced motion, narrow reflow, bounded overflow, and print implementation
scripts/render-lesson-format.mjs and tests/protocol/lesson-format.test.mjs for inert rendering, unsafe-content rejection, path containment, and semantic rendering evidence

Operator-reported successful candidate-matched validation, tests, and Playwright coverage for PREM-WEL-001 keyboard focus/return, 320/390-pixel layouts, documented 200-percent-zoom proxy, reduced motion, bounded overflow, and print construction

findings.finding: The core learning and assessment operations have an equivalent text route: the worked example uses a semantic header table followed by prose that states the same comparison, prompts accept paragraphs, bullets, or outlines, responses are untimed and retakeable, and the lesson explicitly permits typing, pasted assistive-technology output, or device dictation despite no direct audio upload. No operation requires sight alone, speed, pointer precision, personal health data, or physical practical work.

The sole adapted-expression source has immutable syllabus and CONTENT-LICENSE.md permalinks, a CC BY 4.0 adaptation basis, attribution, modification notice, dated agent-access record, and no human-only restriction. Candidate prose and instructional organization are independently expressed; no third-party assets, active content, remote embeds, secrets, personal data, or unsafe clinical media were declared or found. All three disclosed material author runs are consistently identified across the available provenance disclosures.

The rendered route preserves scene source order and semantic headings/lists/tables, provides keyboard navigation and mobile-index focus return, reduced-motion behavior, bounded table overflow, narrow-screen document flow, and a print document containing the lesson and assessment path. These implementation checks support, but do not replace, manual assistive-technology testing.

limitations: This is an evidence-and-policy rights review, not legal advice; CC BY compatibility and attribution are assessed conservatively and may have jurisdiction-specific limits.
I did not conduct live testing with a specific screen reader, browser/operating-system combination, switch device, voice-control system, or physical print device.

The reported automated checks and inspected implementation support keyboard, reflow, zoom-proxy, reduced-motion, overflow, and print behavior, but automated checks do not prove equivalent access for every assistive-technology user.
The review is limited to the frozen Git objects at the stated candidate commit and does not attest to external hosting availability or future browser behavior.
Academic and learning-design concerns, if any, remain referrals for their designated review roles and are not additional approvals here.
